description: The AI reviews member experience signals overnight and surfaces friction patterns before you ask a single question.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from Genesys, Service Cloud, and Data Cloud.
The AI pinpoints exactly where and why friction is occurring across member journeys — channel switches, drop-offs, and CSAT declines.
From the same conversation, the AI creates AgentForce segments, triggers outreach workflows, and escalates cases — with your confirmation at every step.
